blockers.impact: iPhone/Android device QA, screen-reader passes, human canary cohort, and cook-testing cannot be executed by an automated agent
blockers.requiredHumanAction: Run docs/COOK-TEST-PROTOCOL.md and the browser QA matrix on real devices; recruit canary cohort per docs/CANARY-PLAN.md

blockers.impact: Production static routes serve without security headers (pre-6.5 deploy); _headers fix is merged to the branch but production deploys require explicit human authorization
blockers.requiredHumanAction: After PR review/merge: CONFIRM_PRODUCTION=yes npm run deploy:production, then run the smoke suite against https://cook-anything.robofox.online

blockers.impact: Database claiming is concurrency-safe, but the GitHub operator is not fully crash-resumable: a crash after branch creation (or after PR creation but before Supabase recording) strands GitHub state; a reclaiming worker currently fails on the already-existing deterministic branch. Blocks ENABLING the publication operator; does not block merging PR #7.
blockers.requiredHumanAction: None immediately (operator disabled). Before enablement: make the operator idempotent — detect existing deterministic branch, verify its candidate ID + content hash before reuse, detect an existing draft PR for the head branch, continue from the last completed step, never overwrite an unrelated branch; test crashes after branch creation, commit creation and PR creation against a dedicated staging repository.

commitNote: Reviewer-verified merge-ready head. Later commits on the branch are evidence/CI-metadata corrections only (this ledger update itself advances the head).
